name: dataclaw
description: AI-assisted data analytics - query and analyze local data files with natural language

chatParticipants.name: DataClaw
chatParticipants.description: Query and analyze local data files with AI

dataclaw.mcp.enabled.description: Enable the MCP stdio host. When disabled, MCP sessions cannot be started.

dataclaw.mcp.host.description: Host interface for the MCP bridge server.

dataclaw.mcp.port.description: TCP port for the MCP bridge server.

dataclaw.mcp.sessionCap.description: Maximum concurrent MCP stdio sessions. Additional requests queue until a slot is free.

dataclaw.mcp.disabledTools.description: List of tool names to disable for MCP sessions.

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_QueryFileTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Execute a SQL query against one or more data files (Parquet, CSV, JSON, XLSX). Each file is automatically accessible by its basename without extension, so SQL can reference files by view name or by raw file path. Returns columns, data types, row count, and up to pageSize rows.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Query and analyze data files using SQL

filePaths.description: Absolute paths to data files (Parquet, CSV, JSON, XLSX). Each file is accessible as a view named by its basename without extension.

sql.description: SQL query to execute. Can reference files by view name (e.g. SELECT * FROM sales) or by raw path (e.g. SELECT * FROM '/path/to/sales.parquet').

pageSize.description: Maximum number of rows to return per statement (default: 100).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_FileMetadataTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get metadata about a data file. Commands: 'describeFile' returns column names, types, and row count; 'summarizeFile' returns per-column distinct count, null percentage, and inferred type; 'parquetMetadata' returns Parquet footer key-value metadata.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect data file schema and metadata

filePath.description: Absolute path to the data file (Parquet, CSV, JSON, XLSX).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_ColumnStatsTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get detailed statistics for a single column. Commands: 'fileColumnStats' computes stats directly from a data file; 'cacheColumnStats' computes stats from a cached query result. Returns count, nulls, unique values, min, max, and type-specific extras: mean/stddev/quantiles/histogram for numeric, top values for string, timeseries for date.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get detailed column statistics and distributions

filePath.description: Absolute path to the data file (for fileColumnStats).

cacheId.description: Cache ID from a previous query result (for cacheColumnStats).

whereClause.description: Optional SQL WHERE clause to filter rows (for cacheColumnStats).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_ExportTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Export cached query results to a file. Supports CSV, Parquet, JSON, and JSONL formats. Requires a cacheId from a previous QueryFileTool result.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Export query results to CSV, Parquet, JSON, or JSONL

cacheId.description: Cache ID from a previous query result.

outputPath.description: Absolute path for the output file.

maxRows.description: Maximum number of rows to export (optional, exports all if omitted).

sortColumn.description: Column to sort by before export (optional).

whereClause.description: Optional SQL WHERE clause to filter rows before export.

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_SummarizeTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a quick summary of all columns in a data file or cached query result. Commands: 'summarizeFile' summarizes columns directly from a file; 'summarizeCache' summarizes a cached query result. Returns per-column distinct count, null percentage, and inferred type.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Summarize columns in a data file or query result

filePath.description: Absolute path to the data file (for summarizeFile).

cacheId.description: Cache ID from a previous query result (for summarizeCache).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_ChartTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get chart-ready data for a column. Commands: 'chartFileColumn' from a file; 'chartCacheColumn' from a cached result. Returns histogram (numeric), top values (string), or timeseries (date) data suitable for visualization.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get chart data for a column (histogram, top values, timeseries)

filePath.description: Absolute path to the data file (for chartFileColumn).

cacheId.description: Cache ID from a previous query result (for chartCacheColumn).

whereClause.description: Optional SQL WHERE clause to filter rows (for chartCacheColumn).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_SampleTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a random sample of rows from a data file or cached query result. Commands: 'sampleFile' samples from a file; 'sampleCache' samples from a cached result. Uses DuckDB's reservoir sampling for uniform random selection.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get random sample rows from a data file or query result

filePath.description: Absolute path to the data file (for sampleFile).

cacheId.description: Cache ID from a previous query result (for sampleCache).

rows.description: Number of random rows to return (default: 10).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_S3FileTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query or describe data files stored in Amazon S3 directly. Commands: 'describeS3' returns schema and row count; 'queryS3' runs SQL against the S3 file. Supports Parquet, CSV, and JSON. Optional AWS credentials can be provided.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Query data files directly from Amazon S3

sql.description: SQL query to run (for queryS3). If omitted, selects all rows up to pageSize.

accessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID (optional, uses default credentials if omitted).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_DiffTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compare two data files and find differences. Shows rows added in file B, removed from file A, and optionally changed rows (when key columns are specified). Uses SQL EXCEPT for set-based comparison.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Compare two data files and find differences

filePathA.description: Absolute path to the first (baseline) data file.

filePathB.description: Absolute path to the second (comparison) data file.

keyColumns.description: Key columns for detecting changed rows (required for mode 'changed').

maxRows.description: Maximum diff rows to return per category (default: 100).

languageModelTools.name: dataclaw_ExcelSheetTool
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Work with specific sheets in Excel (.xlsx) files. Commands: 'describeSheet' returns column names, types, and row count; 'summarizeSheet' returns per-column statistics; 'sheetColumnStats' returns detailed stats for one column; 'querySheet' runs SQL against the sheet.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Inspect and query specific Excel sheets

command.description: The Excel sheet command to run.

sql.description: SQL query to run against the sheet (for querySheet). The sheet is available as a view.

pageSize.description: Maximum rows to return (default: 100, for querySheet).

scripts.prebuild: npm run sync-schemas && npm run discover-tools && npm run generate-package
scripts.test: npm run prebuild && npm run build && npm run lint && node ./out/test/runTest.js
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run prebuild && npm run typecheck && npm run build:prod
